confirmed.note: predict()/predictBatch()/predictProba() share an identical copied skeleton: same 'capture shared_ptr<Entry> under shared_lock, find/throw out_of_range' block + same 'run inference outside lock, then update health under e.health_mu' block; only the middle inference call and one counter differ

plugin-flatten refactor COPIED whole files plugins/scraper/src/{scraper_config,scraper_plugin,scraper_metadata_writer}.cpp into src/scraper/ WITHOUT deleting the originals; the two trees coexist byte-identical except the #include path -> two divergent live copies

false_positives.what_happened: the 'ThemisDB Version Bot' auto-update commits (84d1fa, e94424, 80cd54, 2563a40, bdb820, 7f2db8, 66fe633, 22562f9 ...) only rewrite a machine-generated boxed banner comment block (File/Version/Last Modified/Quality Metrics/Revision History) present identically at the top of thousands of files; #056 sees a verbatim multi-line block repeated across the whole corpus
false_positives.fix_proposal: strip leading comment banner before hashing: detect a contiguous comment block in the first N lines whose normalized text recurs in >K files and exclude it from the shingle set (treat as a generated header marker, like the protobuf/moc/ggml markers); alternatively skip commits authored by a *-bot/[bot] identity from dup scanning

false_positives.what_happened: toJson()/fromJson() serialization: long runs of 'j["x"] = x;' and 'if (j.contains("x")) cfg.x = j["x"];' plus one-line setters setMalwareFilter/setPiiDetector/... — structurally identical lines differing only by field name, inflating dup6block count
false_positives.fix_proposal: raise the per-block distinct-identifier / distinct-token threshold so blocks that are N copies of the same statement template with only a string-literal/field-name varying are not counted; or detect serialization idiom (>=3 consecutive lines matching `j["..."] = ...` or `if (j.contains(...))`) and collapse to a single weighted token

false_positives.what_happened: subsystem registration boilerplate in the http_server ctor: repeated 'x_api_ = std::make_unique<XHandler>(); THEMIS_INFO("X initialized");' and 'if (std::filesystem::exists(path)) loadFromFile(path,&err)' blocks for ~40 handlers; the init template recurs but each instance wires a different type
false_positives.fix_proposal: treat make_unique/make_shared registration sequences (assign-member + log line) as an init idiom: require that a candidate dup block contain >=K non-call, non-log statements before flagging, so pure 'construct-and-log' wiring does not match

false_positives.what_happened: each 'class ParallelityBenchPhaseXX_YY : public benchmark::Fixture' has a near-identical SetUp()/TearDown() (RocksDBWrapper::Config, remove_all/create_directories(db_path_), db_->open(), createIndex); google-benchmark fixture boilerplate copied per scenario (164 dup6blocks in one file)
false_positives.fix_proposal: down-weight or skip duplication inside benchmark/test fixture scaffolding: detect classes deriving from benchmark::Fixture / ::testing::Test and treat their SetUp/TearDown as fixture boilerplate (exclude or apply a much higher threshold), since identical setup is expected, not a defect

false_positives.what_happened: GPU tiled-matmul kernel: the 'load tile of A / load tile of B' guarded-copy stanzas are the canonical CUDA/HIP shared-memory tiling pattern; the two halves are structurally identical (bounds check + assign or zero), counted as within-file dup
false_positives.fix_proposal: no cheap structural fix beyond the existing min-distinct-token gate; document tiled-kernel load/store stanzas as a known idiom class. Raising the contiguous-block min length (e.g. require >=10 normalized lines with >=6 distinct identifiers) removes these 6-line tile stanzas without hiding the real model_serving case (which spans ~15 lines)
